name: Christmas Tree
desc: The ultimate symbol of holiday illumination, featuring an evergreen tree adorned with colorful twinkling lights and festive ornaments for a bright Christmas glow.

name: Sparkles
desc: Commonly used to represent the shimmering effect of fairy lights and magical holiday decorations. Perfect for describing a house covered in bright, sparkling Christmas lights.

name: Glowing Star
desc: A bright, radiant star symbolizing the top of a Christmas tree or high-end lighted garden decorations. Ideal for festive SEO content focused on celestial holiday themes.

name: Red Paper Lantern
desc: While traditional for many cultures, this lantern is often used to represent warm, outdoor decorative lighting for festive winter walkways and holiday porch displays.

name: Candle
desc: Representing the warmth of traditional holiday lighting and window candles. This emoji captures the cozy, old-fashioned aesthetic of Christmas Eve illumination.

name: Light Bulb
desc: The technical symbol for electricity and lighting, frequently used in DIY guides for hanging outdoor Christmas lights or replacing colorful holiday bulbs.

name: Rainbow
desc: Used metaphorically to represent vibrant, multi-colored strands of LED Christmas lights that illuminate neighborhoods with a spectrum of festive colors.

name: Sparkler
desc: Captures the intense glow of festive handheld lights and pyrotechnic holiday displays. Great for SEO content about Christmas night celebrations and light shows.

name: Fireworks
desc: Symbolizing grand holiday light displays and town tree-lighting ceremonies. Use this to promote local Christmas festivals and spectacular light events.

name: House
desc: Often paired with sparkle emojis to represent 'Christmas light tours' and residential holiday decorating. Targets search intent for festive neighborhood lighting.

name: Dim Button
desc: Used to describe ambient, soft holiday lighting and the subtle glow of indoor Christmas decorations for a hygge-inspired winter atmosphere.

name: Fire
desc: Representing the natural light and warmth of a fireplace. A key emoji for winter lifestyle content focusing on cozy nights by the tree.

name: High Voltage
desc: Often used humorously or practically when discussing the massive electrical setup required for professional-grade extreme Christmas light displays.

name: Night with Stars
desc: Captures the atmosphere of a city illuminated by Christmas lights and holiday shopping district displays. Perfect for urban winter travel guides.

name: Confetti Ball
desc: Symbolizing the burst of color and light during Christmas parties and tree lighting events. Enhances festive SEO for holiday event planning.

name: Orange Circle
desc: Used as a design element to represent warm-white or golden-hued LED strands that are popular in elegant, modern Christmas lighting designs.

name: Green Circle
desc: Represents the specific green bulbs found in traditional red-and-green Christmas light patterns. Ideal for classic holiday color schemes.

name: Red Circle
desc: The primary symbol for red holiday lighting, the most popular color for festive strands and Rudolph-themed light displays.

name: Blue Circle
desc: Captures the cool aesthetic of blue Christmas lights, often used to simulate an icy, winter-wonderland lighting effect in outdoor displays.

name: Sun with Face
desc: Used to contrast the bright sunlight on a snowy Christmas morning with the artificial light of the previous night's festivities.
